\tzpentry{ID4930}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4930 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{H}_{\text{tunnel}} = \Delta \sum (|L\rangle\langle R| + |R\rangle\langle L|) \end{equation}
